Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Sometimes, Tartarus puts up a Monad door on a floor. If you happen to pass one up, it won't open for you during your current exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FDOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}This signal... There's a Monad door here. Keep your eyes open for it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's definitely a Shadow, but this is the first I've seen of its type![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}Huh!? What the...? I lost a signal from one of the treasure chests![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Could it be... a Shadow's snatching up treasure on this floor?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}Could it be attracted to the loot somehow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}The Shadow's on the move now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It's headed your way—brace for combat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}It seemed like some kind of rare Shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}Shocking size to it though, right? Yet it got away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Given its size, I imagine defeating it would be well worth our while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}What do you say, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}The Greedy Shadow's closing in on you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I think we'd get a really nice haul if we could defeat it. Would you like to chase it down?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_HIGH_RARE_00
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll let it off the hook this time.

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1086 0 0}You're kidding, right? Obviously, we go after it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Mr. Sticky Fingers stole our loot! We need to straighten him out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Let's see how it carries itself in a fight. No sense letting it go scot-free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}A specimen of that size is certainly a rare sight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}Koro-chan's chomping at the bit! What do you say, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6065 0 0}It was so big and golden and shiny... Almost larger than life. What's your decision, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7075 0 0}It sure was something, wasn't it? Don't you think we should go after it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Our target is fleeing at breakneck speed. You'll need to track it down quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5123 0 0}Understood. We shouldn't get too distracted trying to chase it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's return to our exploration, shall we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We can use my Tartarus Search to make sure we corner it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}What would you like to do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}We can use my Tartarus Search to make sure we corner it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}We can use my Tartarus Search to make sure we corner it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_DEFEA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, that was a lucky find, wasn't it? Now that that's settled, shall we get back to exploring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_KEYFR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Back to business for us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_005F_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We may be able to use it. Do check it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_005F_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We may be able to use it. Would you mind inspecting it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RBOX_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm sensing a valuable chest nearby. See if you can retrieve it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RBOX_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}There's a valuable chest close by. Can you get it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_MBOX_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm detecting a chest that requires fragments to open. Try to find it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_MBOX_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It looks like one of those chests that need fragments to open is around here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_CLOCK_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}This floor seems like it's connected to somewhere else for some reason...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_CLOCK_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Is that a... door on this floor? It feels similar to the entrance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RENEMY_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm... I'm sensing a rare Shadow on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RENEMY_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Oh, it looks like there's a rare Shadow on this floor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_BUGENEMY_MITSURU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm, the enemies here seem to be acting strangely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_BUGENEMY_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Huh? The Shadows on this floor are acting weird...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLRARE_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}This is quite astonishing... There appear to only be rare Shadows on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLRARE_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}I thought I detected rare Shadows on this floor, but... only rare Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLSTR_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}It appears all the enemies on this floor are powerful. Exercise extreme caution![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLSTR_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}This whole floor is full of strong enemies! Be careful here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_DARK_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}It's difficult to see anything on this floor. Keep your guard up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_DARK_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}It's too dark to make anything out here! Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_FOUND_NEAR1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}There's a person nearby. It must be one of those missing people who wandered in here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I'm getting a signal from floor {f 2 4 1}. Let's hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_FOUND_NEAR2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Are those...? I'm sensing humans nearby! They must be those missing people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I'm getting readings from floors {f 2 4 1} and {f 2 4 2}. We have to rescue them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_UPPER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}I'm getting a faint reading of a person. It could be one of the people who got lost in here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It's too far for me to pinpoint their location. They seem to be on a much higher floor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_LOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}There's someone in here. It's probably a missing person...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}But they're far away. It seems like they're on a much lower floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NOT_REACHED0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I sense someone on a higher floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It's a floor we haven't been to yet, though. I hope we can get there soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NOT_REACHED0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I sense someone on a higher floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It's a floor we haven't been to yet, though. I hope we can get there soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}It doesn't seem like a Shadow... It's larger and seems almost like a wall...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD_ADDTALK01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}Hmm... If it's dangerous, it's possible that it could in fact be riskier to simply ignore it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD_ADDTALK02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Well, fortune favors the brave, right? Besides, we didn't come this far by running from our fights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Okay, then. Going by the signal I'm getting, it shouldn't be far from you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TUTO_StrongSymbol01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}While exploring, you may come across enemies in altered status conditions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}Enraged enemies will rapidly charge at you in a straight line. If combat is triggered, some of the enemies may be afflicted with Rage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}Rage is just one possible altered enemy status. Pay attention to enemies' behavior to glean what you might be dealing with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_RareUranai
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune-teller mentioned that[n]I will "face an adversary clad in gold"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I'll run into a rare enemy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Oh, I should tell you something Kirijo-senpai told me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}She said there's a Reaper that appears in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Apparently, it will appear out of nowhere and chase you endlessly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}And if you get caught, um... I think you know what is supposed to happen if a "Reaper" catches you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Maybe it's trying to get rid of us since we're outsiders in Tartarus...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}She wasn't too sure on the details, but I guess it appears when you stay on one floor for too long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Jamming may not work{f 0 1 27} on it, so please evacuate to another floor if you ever encounter it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5102 0 0}There are so many enemies, I don't think we'll be able to avoid them entirely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_TUTO_JAMMING
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}З нами все буде гаразд—у нас є Фуука.

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_02_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Зачекай, будь ласка! Без плану може бути небезпечно...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_02_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Um, I appreciate your confidence in me, but I mostly just locate enemies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Hm... Actually, I may be able to help out here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I'm going to use my {f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27} skill![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27} obstructs enemy detection, making it harder for them to find you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Іншими словами, вороги не повинні атакувати тебе, навіть якщо ти потрапляєш у їхню зону видимості.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Це не завжди спрацює для всіх ворогів, але для цих...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Допоможи мені, Люсія!..[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_ENEMY_ESCAPE_M0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}Hm? The enemies on this floor seem restless...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}I see... They're intimidated by us. We should be able to avoid any unnecessary combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_ENEMY_ESCAPE_F0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}Huh? The enemies on this floor seem strangely agitated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It looks like they're afraid of us. Maybe you won't have to fight them if you don't want to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SYLP01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Before fighting a stronger enemy, there's a skill of mine I'd like you to use. It's called {f 0 1 35}Sylphid Aura{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SYLP02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It'll enhance everyone's abilities a bit at the start of battle. It might give you some peace of mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SHOCK01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5066 0 0}If you want to be able to explore a little easier, you might want to use my {f 0 1 35}Shock Noise{f 0 1 27} skill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SHOCK02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It'll inflict Distress on all enemies on a floor so they flee when they see you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_ESCAPE01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}If you ever get stuck somewhere and can't find a teleporter to use...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}You can use my skill {f 0 1 35}Escape Route{f 0 1 27} to return to the entrance whenever you like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_ESCAPE02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}If you're running low on health or stamina, please don't push yourself—come back and regroup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SEARCH01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}You can use my skill {f 0 1 35}Tartarus Search{f 0 1 27} to analyze the floor you're currently on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It'll give you a layout of the whole floor, and you can even move right to the next floor if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SEARCH02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It does take stamina, though, so you can't use it over and over, but use it when you need to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}By the way, I received a report from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}Oh, by the way, the chairman sent me a report.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}You know that {f 0 1 2}clock{f 0 1 27} by the stairs at the entrance? The one that's about as tall as you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}You know how there's a {f 0 1 2}clock{f 0 1 27} about our height next to the stairs at the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}At first glance, it may look ornamental, but it can actually be operated by using {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It might just look decorative, but it apparently works with {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Supposedly, it can "restore the user to his or her rightful state."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}According to the chairman, it's supposed to "restore the user to his or her rightful state."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}I suppose its purpose is recovery. I'm curious how it works, but regardless, let's take advantage of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I guess it's supposed to help you recover. It seems mysterious, but I think we should make use of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_042F_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm... I don't sense any enemies above here. We may be approaching a {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Reaching it would be a great accomplishment. I'll be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_042F_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Oh, it looks likely that the {f 0 1 2}next floor{f 0 1 27} is a {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If we make it, that'll be one milestone cleared. Good luck![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_060F_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm picking up on another {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27} in... {f 0 1 2}nine{f 0 1 27} floors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's still pretty far off, so let's focus on getting through here first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_TheurgiaGauge01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'd like to share something I've found out about using {f 0 1 2}Theurgy{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Theurgy can't be used just any time. The user has to reach an emotional peak first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}In other words, Theurgy can only be used {f 0 1 2}after enough power has built up{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Also, how someone builds up this power is different depending on the person.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}For Kirijo-senpai, it's when she inflicts status ailments on an enemy, but for Yukari-chan, it's when she heals someone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Try out different things and see what works for different teammates.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Theurgy is very powerful. We'll definitely want to use it as much as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SHIFT_GET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Тепер ви можете робити Заміну в бою.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type01_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Rarity Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}I will face an adversary clad in[n]gold{f 0 1 27}. Maybe I'll run into a rare enemy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Blighting Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}I will gain an advantage in[n]conflicts{f 0 1 27}. I might be luckier in battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Gamble Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
